parts.text: Scan recent updates from FCA, PRA, and HMT for a Retail Wealth Management firm. Provide immediately actionable compliance changes and rate their urgency.
Are there any overlaps or contradictions between GDPR data breach notification requirements and the Bank of England/PRA operational resilience policies for a Mid-Tier Digital Bank?
Search the UK Sanctions List (FCDO UKSL) for Haji Khairullah and evaluate if there are any financial crime or compliance risks for a BNPL Fintech onboarding this entity.
